seoTitle: Dargan vs Dark Corner — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Dargan vs Dark Corner: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dargan and Dark Corner.
heading: Dargan vs Dark Corner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dargan, New South Wales and Dark Corner, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dark Corner has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Dargan (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dargan or Dark Corner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dargan has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Dark Corner scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dargan scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Dark Corner scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dargan or Dark Corner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dark Corner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
